name: Di Saronno Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch square pan.
3. Melt butter and chocolate in a small pan; set aside to cool.
4. Stir in eggs.
5. Add remaining ingredients, except Di Saronno Amaretto, and mix well.
6. Bake for 35 minutes. Brownies should still be soft.
7. Cool.
8. Poke with fork.
9. Pour Di Saronno Amaretto over top of brownies.
10. Refrigerate overnight.
11. Ice with favorite chocolate frosting.
12. Cut into squares.
